summary: Focused grkraid stage matching PR. It changed grkraid C source, its header formatting, and ground variable signedness/formatting in types.h. Bot report records three newly matched grkraid functions and two additional grkraid improvements.

key_files.role: Primary decomp source changes for grkraid matching; rewrites several functions, removes a const zero Vec, adds getMapRotation helper, adjusts expressions, casts, includes, formatting, and retains PAD_STACK in grKraid_801FEA00.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: src/melee/gr/grkraid.c added 168 deleted 154 hunks 9
raw_diff: src/melee/gr/grkraid.c hunks around grKraid_801FE440, grKraid_801FE6D8, grKraid_801FE818, grKraid_801FEA00, grKraid_801FEE54
text_corpus: decomp-dev bot report lists grkraid match/improvement results

key_files.role: Header prototype formatting update for grKraid_801FE6D8.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: src/melee/gr/grkraid.h added 1 deleted 1 hunks 1
raw_diff: grKraid_801FE6D8 prototype changed from HSD_JObj*,float to HSD_JObj*, float

key_files.role: Ground variable type refinements for grKraid structs plus nearby formatting-only changes in grOldYoshi structs.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: src/melee/gr/types.h added 6 deleted 6 hunks 4
raw_diff: grKraid_GroundVars.x0 changed u8 to s8; grKraid_GroundVars2.x3 changed u8 to s8
raw_diff: grOldYoshi_Cloud bitfield spacing and cloud array spacing changes

what_changed.text: grKraid_801FE440 was rewritten to use a local zero-initialized Vec instead of const Vec grKr_803B8278, use cleaner switch formatting, use a ternary for absolute value of xC, and use an implicit float truth test for gp->gv.kraid.x4 with an inline remark that explicit != 0.0f changed ordering.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: removed const Vec grKr_803B8278 and replaced Vec pos = grKr_803B8278 with Vec pos = { 0.0f, 0.0f, 0.0f }
raw_diff: grKraid_801FE440 case 0 condition changed to if (gp->gv.kraid.x4) with remark
text_corpus: bot report says grKraid_801FE440 improved 97.82% to 100.00%

what_changed.text: grKraid_801FE6D8 gained static helper getMapRotation, removed an unused int local, introduced f32 rot, used a ternary absolute value for handpos.x without mutating handpos.x, and kept OSReport and camera calls.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: getMapRotation added before grKraid_801FE6D8
raw_diff: int useless replaced by f32 rot
raw_diff: map->gv.kraid.x8 assigned rot * ((handpos.x < 0.0f) ? -handpos.x : handpos.x)
text_corpus: bot report says grKraid_801FE6D8 improved 88.93% to 99.60%

what_changed.text: grKraid_801FE818 changed wait-time randomization expression to cast kraid_wait_time_add to s32 in the conditional.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grKraid_801FE818 wait time expression uses ((s32) grKr_804D6A08->kraid_wait_time_add != 0 ? HSD_Randi(...) : 0)
text_corpus: bot report says grKraid_801FE818 improved 90.70% to 91.20%

what_changed.text: grKraid_801FEA00 was reformatted and adjusted but retained PAD_STACK(0x70); bot report records it as newly matched.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grKraid_801FEA00 contains PAD_STACK(0x70)
raw_diff: grKraid_801FEA00 switch cases reformatted and expressions adjusted
text_corpus: bot report says grKraid_801FEA00 improved 99.78% to 100.00%

what_changed.text: grKraid_801FEE54 converted an if/else random choice into a ternary and reformatted JObj translate calls; bot report records it as newly matched.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: iVar3 = HSD_Randi(2) != 0 ? gp->gv.kraid2.x3 : gp->gv.kraid2.x4
text_corpus: bot report says grKraid_801FEE54 improved 99.85% to 100.00%

what_changed.text: Ground variable fields grKraid_GroundVars.x0 and grKraid_GroundVars2.x3 changed from unsigned to signed 8-bit types.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: struct grKraid_GroundVars x0 u8 -> s8
raw_diff: struct grKraid_GroundVars2 x3 u8 -> s8

smart_moves.text: Kept the zero vector local in grKraid_801FE440 rather than preserving a named const data object solely for the addressable literal.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: const Vec grKr_803B8278 removed
raw_diff: Vec pos = { 0.0f, 0.0f, 0.0f } added
decomp_standards:literals-and-data-ownership

smart_moves.text: Introduced getMapRotation to isolate a repeated or codegen-sensitive arithmetic expression in grKraid_801FE6D8, making the main function easier to review.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: static f32 getMapRotation added
raw_diff: grKraid_801FE6D8 uses rot = getMapRotation()

smart_moves.text: Used ternaries for select-like assignments and absolute-value-style expressions where the diff evidence shows they improved or matched code.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: fVar2 ternary in grKraid_801FE440
raw_diff: handpos.x absolute-value ternary in grKraid_801FE6D8
raw_diff: iVar3 random choice ternary in grKraid_801FEE54
decomp_standards:canonical-control-flow-and-macros

decomp_lessons.text: For grkraid matching, a float field truth test may produce different ordering than an explicit != 0.0f comparison; this PR used if (gp->gv.kraid.x4) and left a remark that the explicit comparison led to incorrect ordering.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: if (gp->gv.kraid.x4) with remark 'Explicit != 0.0f comparison leads to incorrect ordering'
text_corpus: bot report says grKraid_801FE440 reached 100.00%

decomp_lessons.text: When matching code that passes a position vector later, computing an absolute value with a ternary can avoid mutating the original coordinate while still producing the needed arithmetic form.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: removed mutation of handpos.x to positive value
raw_diff: map->gv.kraid.x8 = rot * ((handpos.x < 0.0f) ? -handpos.x : handpos.x)
raw_diff: Camera_80030E44(3, &handpos) remains after the calculation

decomp_lessons.text: Signedness of small state/index fields can matter for matching; this PR changed two grKraid ground-var u8 fields to s8 in types.h.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grKraid_GroundVars.x0 u8 -> s8
raw_diff: grKraid_GroundVars2.x3 u8 -> s8

naming_conventions.text: New helper name getMapRotation uses descriptive camelCase local helper style but is static to grkraid.c; no evidence in the slice proves a broader naming convention.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: static f32 getMapRotation() added

naming_conventions.text: Existing address-style function names such as grKraid_801FE440, grKraid_801FE6D8, grKraid_801FEA00, and grKraid_801FEE54 were preserved.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: function names retained in changed hunks
decomp_standards:conservative-naming

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: PAD_STACK(0x70) was retained in grKraid_801FEA00; the bot report records the function as reaching 100%, but the PR slice does not explain why this stack padding is required.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grKraid_801FEA00 contains PAD_STACK(0x70)
text_corpus: bot report says grKraid_801FEA00 reached 100.00%
decomp_standards:matching-tactics-need-evidence

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: A cast to s32 on grKr_804D6A08->kraid_wait_time_add was used in wait-time conditional expressions in grKraid_801FE818 and grKraid_801FEA00.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grKraid_801FE818 wait time conditional casts kraid_wait_time_add to s32
raw_diff: grKraid_801FEA00 case 4 wait time conditional casts kraid_wait_time_add to s32

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Switch-case formatting and ternary select forms were used in functions reported as matches or improvements.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grKraid_801FE440 switch and ternary expression changes
raw_diff: grKraid_801FEA00 switch case reformatting
raw_diff: grKraid_801FEE54 ternary random choice
text_corpus: bot report lists matches/improvements

review_feedback.text: No human review comments were present in the loaded slice. Automated decomp-dev bot report recorded +2300 matched-code bytes, three new matches, and two improvements.
evidence_refs: metadata_json: review_comments 0, reviews 0, issue_comments 1
text_corpus: decomp-dev bot report for GALE01

searchable_terms: explicit != 0.0f comparison leads to incorrect ordering

evidence_refs: metadata_json: PR identity, merge state, changed-file counts
raw_diff: complete diff loaded, not truncated
text_corpus: PR body empty; one bot issue comment with match report
metadata_json: review_comments 0, reviews 0
notes: The diff and automated report provide strong evidence for changed files and reported match outcomes.
There is no PR body and no human review discussion, so author intent and reviewer rationale are mostly unavailable.
The bot report supports match/improvement claims but does not provide detailed objdiff/build logs or explain individual tactics such as PAD_STACK.
Some types.h changes outside grKraid appear formatting-only and should not be overinterpreted.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Implicit float truth test can matter for MWCC ordering
accepted_candidate_records.text: In grKraid_801FE440, the PR changed an explicit gp->gv.kraid.x4 != 0.0f comparison to if (gp->gv.kraid.x4) and left a remark that the explicit comparison led to incorrect ordering; bot report says the function reached 100%.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grKraid_801FE440 condition and remark
text_corpus: bot report grKraid_801FE440 100.00%

accepted_candidate_records.title: Do not mutate coordinate input when later code still needs original vector
accepted_candidate_records.text: In grKraid_801FE6D8, the PR replaced mutation of handpos.x for absolute value with a ternary expression feeding x8, while Camera_80030E44 still receives &handpos afterward.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: removed handpos.x = -handpos.x block
raw_diff: x8 uses ternary absolute value
raw_diff: Camera_80030E44(3, &handpos)

source_update_candidates.title: grKraid ground-var signedness updates in PR 2275
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2275 changed grKraid_GroundVars.x0 and grKraid_GroundVars2.x3 from u8 to s8 in src/melee/gr/types.h.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grKraid_GroundVars.x0 u8 -> s8
raw_diff: grKraid_GroundVars2.x3 u8 -> s8
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential path fact for grkraid type recovery; needs curator validation against current source and symbols before promotion.

source_update_candidates.title: Float comparison spelling can affect ordering
source_update_candidates.text: Consider noting that for MWCC matching, an implicit float truth test and an explicit != 0.0f comparison may produce different ordering; PR 2275 has an inline remark in grKraid_801FE440 that explicit != 0.0f led to incorrect ordering.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grKraid_801FE440 condition changed to if (gp->gv.kraid.x4) with remark
text_corpus: bot report grKraid_801FE440 100.00%
source_update_candidates.reason: Possibly reusable matching tactic, but only one PR slice supports it; route to curator rather than accepting as a global standard.

source_update_candidates.title: Preserve original vector values when deriving absolute-value temporaries
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2275 suggests using a ternary absolute-value expression instead of mutating a coordinate field when the vector is later passed by address.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grKraid_801FE6D8 x8 expression uses ternary absolute handpos.x
raw_diff: Camera_80030E44(3, &handpos) follows
source_update_candidates.reason: Could refine existing control-flow/expression guidance, but broader applicability needs curator review.

rejection_notes: Do not infer that getMapRotation is a general project naming convention; the slice only shows one static helper.
Do not treat PAD_STACK(0x70) as generally acceptable style from this PR alone; the bot report supports a function match but no detailed tactic rationale is loaded.
Do not claim human reviewer approval or requested changes; no human reviews or review comments are present in the slice.
Do not promote grOldYoshi formatting changes as a grOldYoshi decomp lesson; the diff evidence shows only spacing changes in this PR.
